title: Rustins GPBU250 250ml Small Job - Buttercup
features: Specifically produced for small painting projects
Ideal to use on children's toys.
description: Product Description Small Job Gloss Paints are specifically produced for small painting projects. A 250ml tin covers approximately 3.25 sq metres, whilst a 500ml tin will cover 6-7 sq metres. Small Job Gloss Paint is available in 9 vibrant colours, plus Black and White in 250ml & 500ml sizes. It also conforms to the Toys (Safety) Regulations 1995, BS:EN71 Part 3, which makes it ideal to use on children's toys. Box Contains 1 x Small Job Buttercup 250ml
